Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Its Firsst Set Of Form Interrogatories; Request For Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $1,090.00 Against Plaintiff And Her Attys' Of Record
Off Calendar Jul-17-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant Faye Jones' motion to compel further responses to form interrogatories is granted. Plaintiff is ordered to serve a verified supplemental response within 10 days of notice of this order. The objections are overruled and stricken. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $490 shall be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.
